title: Contract Tests, Race and Leak Checks, Chaos, and Release · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: An engineering, security, accessibility, data, and operations review board. The board needs least privilege, verified TLS, causal telemetry, Go runtime and broker capacity evidence, race and leak gates, broker and dependency fault drills, a supported 4.3 upgrade, compatible rollout, rollback, recovery objectives, and residual-risk ownership. Planned artifact: Deliver RabbitMQ 4.3 and Go Production Defense with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension.…
objectives: Use TLS with trusted CA, hostname and SNI verification, minimum protocol policy, client identity where required, and tested certificate rotation; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Trace memory and disk alarms, connection blocking, client blocked events, broker flow control, local publish drain, and upstream load shedding; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Amqps Identity Verification
steps.instruction:
project case — A project Go messaging team handles case 8497 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate release on contracts, race and leak evidence, broker faults, compatibility, rollback, and upgrade path; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Amqps Identity Verification.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use tls with trusted ca, hostname and sni verification, minimum protocol policy, client identity where required, and tested certificate rotation; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Amqps Identity Verification, keep Amqps Identity Verification connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
